_doc: RUNE BSC Mainnet QuickNode Stream config. Either copy fields manually into the QuickNode console UI, or POST this body (after base64-encoding `filter.code`) to https://api.quicknode.com/streams/rest/v1/streams with header `x-api-key: <your QuickNode API key>`.
name: rune-mainnet-events
description: RUNE Community.EventAddReferrer + NodePresell.EventNodePresell on BSC mainnet (chainId 56). Ships filtered logs to Supabase Edge Function for upsert into rune_referrers / rune_members / rune_purchases.
_dataset_note: QuickNode UI may label this as 'Logs' — what we want is the receipt-shaped payload (each entry has status + nested logs). The downstream filter is written for that shape.

start._note: Community contract deploy block on BSC mainnet. Matches `chain.ts` startBlock so we don't re-scan empty pre-deploy history.

batch._note: Single block per message keeps end-to-end latency near block time (3s on BSC). Larger batches save delivery cost but add latency.

filter._note: Paste this verbatim into 'Modify the stream payload → Customize your payload' in the QuickNode console. For REST API, base64-encode the `code` string and send as `filter_function`.

hmac._secret_note: Set as `QUICKNODE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in the mainnet Supabase project. Already done — verify with `supabase secrets list --project-ref mefjuecwawmjfmeofnck`.

_verify_steps: 1. Save Stream → status should turn Active within ~30s.
2. QuickNode console → Stream → 'Logs' tab: every block triggers a delivery (HTTP 200 + body `{"ok":true,"ingested":{...}}`). Empty blocks trigger NO delivery (filter returns null).
3. Run `psql ... -c "SELECT count(*) FROM rune_referrers WHERE chain_id=56"` and watch it climb on real bindings.
4. If 401: secret mismatch — re-`supabase secrets set` and re-save Stream HMAC field.
_idempotency_note: rune_referrers and rune_purchases use unique index on (chain_id, tx_hash, log_index); rune_members uses (user, chain_id). So this Stream and the existing Railway indexer can run in parallel without dupes — whichever delivers an event first wins, the other's INSERT is silently dropped by ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING.
